findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Weak path containment check using String.startsWith
 * @description Path containment validated using String.startsWith without prior canonicalization is bypassable
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/weak-path-startswith-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find any startsWith call used as a path check
from MethodCall mc, MethodCall fileOp
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String") and
  // Check if there's a file operation nearby without canonicalization
  not exists(MethodCall canon |
    (canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath") or
     canon.getMethod().hasName("normalize")) and
    DataFlow::localFlow(DataFlow::exprNode(canon), DataFlow::exprNode(mc.getQualifier()))
  )
select mc, "Path containment check using String.startsWith without prior canonicalization - potentially bypassable via path traversal sequences"
findings.hypothesis: String.startsWith() used for path containment checks without prior canonicalization, allowing bypass via ../ sequences

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Detailed path validation patterns in plugin code
 * @description Shows all File operations and startsWith checks in plugin-related classes to understand path validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/plugin-path-patterns
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

from MethodCall mc
where
  (
    // startsWith checks in PlguinClassLoader or PluginConfigImpl
    mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String") and
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("com.alibaba.oneagent.plugin.%")
  )
  or
  (
    // File/Path operations in these classes
    (mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     mc.getMethod().hasName("getAbsolutePath") or
     mc.getMethod().hasName("getPath") or
     mc.getMethod().hasName("toPath") or
     mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
     mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath")) and
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("com.alibaba.oneagent.plugin.%")
  )
select mc, "Path operation in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Examining all path validation patterns in plugin code to understand the security posture

Path operation in com.alibaba.oneagent.plugin.PlguinClassLoader.loadClass at line 25: startsWith

Path operation in com.alibaba.oneagent.plugin.PluginManagerImpl.loadPlugin at line 113: getAbsolutePath
Path operation in com.alibaba.oneagent.plugin.config.PluginConfigImpl.extractPluginProperties at line 101: startsWith

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name External path control via FeatureCodec - no path traversal prevention
 * @description Agent arguments flow through FeatureCodec into File constructors in AgentImpl without path traversal checks
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/featurecodec-path-traversal
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 *       external/cwe/cwe-073
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

// Find all new File() calls in critical files that lack any path validation
from ClassInstanceExpr ce, Method enclosing
where
  ce.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.io", "File") and
  enclosing = ce.getEnclosingCallable() and
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName().matches("com.alibaba.oneagent.%") and
  // Look for cases where no getCanonicalPath / getCanonicalFile has been called nearby
  not exists(MethodCall mc |
    (mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalPath") or
     mc.getMethod().hasName("getCanonicalFile") or
     mc.getMethod().hasName("toRealPath")) and
    mc.getEnclosingCallable() = enclosing
  )
select ce, "File construction in " + enclosing.getDeclaringType().getQualifiedName() + "." + enclosing.getName() + " without path canonicalization - potential path traversal"
findings.hypothesis: File constructors used in agent plugin code without any adjacent path canonicalization
